mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_record (activity_id, student_id, enroll_time, sign_status) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{studentId}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_record WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_record WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM activity_record WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT ar.enroll_time AS enrollTime, ar.sign_status AS signStatus, ar.sign_time AS signTime, s.student_id AS studentId, s.student_name AS studentName, s.student_department AS studentDepartment FROM activity_record ar LEFT JOIN student s ON ar.student_id = s.student_id WHERE ar.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY ar.enroll_time ASC

SELECT ar.student_id AS studentId, ar.enroll_time AS enrollTime, ar.sign_time AS signTime, s.student_name AS studentName, s.student_department AS studentDepartment FROM activity_record ar LEFT JOIN student s ON ar.student_id = s.student_id WHERE ar.activity_id = #{activityId} AND ar.sign_status = 1 ORDER BY ar.sign_time ASC
